text.text:
I cannot say enough great things about Pearl Dental NYC. From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with genuine warmth and professionalism. The entire staff is attentive, friendly, and truly committed to making every visit as comfortable as possible.

The office itself is spotless, modern, and calming—exactly the atmosphere you want when going to the dentist. My appointment was efficient, yet never rushed. The team took the time to explain everything clearly, answer all my questions, and ensure I felt completely at ease.

I walked out feeling confident, well taken care of, and beyond impressed. If you’re looking for a dental practice in NYC that combines expertise, compassion, and top-tier service, Pearl Dental NYC is truly the best. Highly recommend!

text.text: I have been looking for a dentist ever since moving to New York and I finally found one that ticks all of my boxes in Pearl Dental. Everyone is super kind and knowledgeable. The office is beautiful and clean. You can tell that the patient is always the priority in the way that they prioritize your comfort and take their time to get to know you. Dr. Perlroth is incredibly thorough and has great chairside manner. Both Anya and Angie were so welcoming and made me feel at home. The quality of the restorations are fantastic as well. I just got my first filling and they showed me pictures of the finished tooth while I was still in the chair and it looked exactly like a normal healthy tooth. If you are in the position I was in last year and looking to make a change in dental care, but feeling overwhelmed / not knowing where to start or who to trust, Pearl Dental is worth a visit!

text.text: I had such a lovely experience at Pearl Dental! Dr. Perlroth was incredibly kind, patient, and gentle. The entire appointment was completely painless and so reassuring. You can really tell she cares about her patients and takes the time to make sure you’re comfortable every step of the way. The whole team was just as sweet, and her assistant, Anya, was so thoughtful and made me feel at ease right away. It’s rare to find a dental office that feels this warm and genuine. I’m so grateful to have found them and truly couldn’t recommend them more!

text.text:
I had such a wonderful experience at Pearl Dental. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel comfortable and welcome. The front desk team was warm, professional, and efficient, making check-in and scheduling a breeze.

The dental team was outstanding—kind, patient, and incredibly knowledgeable. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure I felt at ease throughout my visit. The clinic itself is spotless, modern, and equipped with the latest technology, which gave me a lot of confidence in the care I was receiving.

What really stood out to me was the genuine care and attention from everyone I interacted with. They go above and beyond to ensure patients feel valued and cared for. I couldn’t be happier with my experience and highly recommend this clinic to anyone looking for top-notch dental care!

text.text: Just went in for another cleaning session and I must say I highly recommend this dental office. Before I even went into the office, I was sent reminders and even given a call.  When I showed up, I was greeted with warm smiles and was brought right in.  I felt like I got to see the entire team. This was the first time meeting their newest dental hygienist Angie. She was very personable and actually took the time to get to know me before we even talked about my teeth. It took away that weird feeling of having a silent stranger just digging right into my mouth. My teeth felt clean and refreshed after the session. I think the best part is I didn't feel judged the whole time. They gave me an awesome care package before I left. While setting up my next appointment, I totally forgot to complete the transaction for my copay and walked back into my office.  I was simply sent a link to complete it via text and I didn't need to go back. I've been coming for years and Dr. Perlroth was like an artist with my filling. Everyone that I've recommended has agreed Pearl Dental is amazing. I'm looking forward to my next visit.
